idea-plugin.name: Agent CLI
idea-plugin.description:
Programmatically control IntelliJ IDEA (and other JetBrains IDEs) via a CLI and HTTP API. Useful for automation, scripting, and integrations with AI assistants like Claude Code.

The plugin starts an HTTP server inside your JetBrains IDE. A companion CLI binary talks to that server, letting you run commands and Kotlin scripts with full access to the IntelliJ API.

CLI Binary
Download or build the CLI from github.com/Haehnchen/idea-intellij-cli:
  • cd cli && go build -o intellij-cli — build from source
  • make install — build and install to ~/.local/bin

CLI Usage
  • intellij-cli health — Check server status
  • intellij-cli projects — List open projects
  • intellij-cli plugins — List installed plugins
  • intellij-cli exec -c "println(project.name)" — Execute inline Kotlin code
  • intellij-cli exec -f <script> — Execute a .kt script
  • intellij-cli actions — List available action scripts

AI Agent Skill Installation
If you use Claude Code or another agent that supports skills, install the skill so the agent knows how to use the CLI:
  • intellij-cli skill project-claude — this project only (.claude/skills/)
  • intellij-cli skill global-claude — all projects (~/.claude/skills/)
  • intellij-cli skill project — other agents, this project (.agents/skills/)
  • intellij-cli skill global — other agents, all projects (~/.agents/skills/)

Writing Custom Scripts
Scripts run inside the IDE with full access to IntelliJ APIs. Available bindings:
  • project — Current IntelliJ project
  • application — IntelliJ Application instance
  • readAction { } — Run code in a read action
  • writeAction { } — Run code in a write action
  • println(msg) — Print output back to the CLI

Multiple IDEs & Projects
The IDE and project are auto-detected from the current working directory. If multiple IDEs or projects are running, pass the port or project path explicitly:
intellij-cli -P 8571 action find_references file=src/Foo.kt line=42 column=15

IDE-Specific Default Ports
IntelliJ IDEA: 8568, Android Studio: 8569, PyCharm: 8570, WebStorm: 8571, GoLand: 8572, PhpStorm: 8573, RubyMine: 8574, CLion: 8575, RustRover: 8576, DataGrip: 8577, Aqua: 8578, DataSpell: 8579, Rider: 8580. Other IDEs: 8599

REST API Endpoints
  • GET /health — Server health check
  • GET /projects — List open projects
  • POST /execute — Execute Kotlin code
  • POST /action/discover — Discover available actions

Note: Server is disabled by default. Enable it in Settings → Tools → Agent CLI.
